case_title: THOMAS LANDERS VS. TED VRAKAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-27-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66994411)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-24-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
